overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking through a rural Japanese village in autumn. The character traverses tall grass fields, passes traditional thatched-roof buildings, and approaches a stone fortification while vibrant red maple trees and distant mountains dominate the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural grassland path with stone wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path through tall grass, passing a stone wall on the left while approaching a traditional farmhouse

entered.detail: low stone wall running parallel to the path on the left side
golden tall grass covering the ground on both sides of the path
large mountain with snow-covered peak visible in the distance
thick black smoke rising into the sky from behind the mountain
vibrant red Japanese maple trees scattered across the landscape
wooden farmhouse with thatched roof visible beyond the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open grassland field with a stone wall on the left. In the distance, a snow-capped mountain rises behind a plume of black smoke, while vibrant red maple trees dot the right side of the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: village path lined with red maple trees

events.description: entering village area with dense red maple trees and traditional wooden buildings

agents.ego_description: walking through the village, passing traditional wooden houses with thatched roofs surrounded by red maples

entered.detail: clear dirt path winding through the village

segments.scene_description: The character enters a village area where the path becomes more defined. Traditional wooden farmhouses appear on the right while dense red maple trees create a canopy overhead. The stone wall and tall grass of the open field fall behind as the village architecture becomes prominent.

events.description: approaching a large damaged building with collapsed thatched roof and scattered debris

agents.ego_description: walking past a severely damaged traditional house with collapsed roof, exposed wooden beams, and scattered pottery

entered.detail: large traditional building with collapsed thatched roof, exposed wooden structure, and debris
tall wooden ladder structure leaning against a platform in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character passes a badly damaged traditional building with a collapsed roof on the right side. The structure shows signs of destruction with scattered debris and exposed wooden beams. Red maple trees now line the left side of the path as a wooden watchtower becomes visible in the distance.

events.description: character pauses briefly to look out over the valley filled with red maple trees

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated path, pausing to overlook the expansive valley filled with red maple trees and distant mountains

entered.detail: expansive valley covered in dense red maple trees stretching to the horizon
stone wall and gate structure visible in the distance across the valley

segments.scene_description: Moving past the damaged building, the character ascends to an elevated path with a commanding view of a vast valley filled with red maple trees. A wooden watchtower stands prominently on the left, while a stone fortification with smoke rising behind it becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to stone gate with smoke

events.description: approaching stone wall and gate structure with smoke rising from behind the fortification

agents.ego_description: walking toward a stone fortification with wooden gate, smoke rising from burning debris behind the wall

entered.detail: fortified stone gate with wooden doors and stone walls extending on both sides
smoldering remains and fire behind the stone gate

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a fortified stone gate structure. Thick smoke rises from burning debris behind the wall, indicating recent destruction. The wooden watchtower and valley view recede as the character focuses on the gate ahead, with the snow-capped mountain now visible to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open autumn grassland into a war-torn village that culminates at a fortified stone gate. It begins with the character traversing a field beside a stone wall, with a snow-capped mountain and a plume of black smoke visible in the far distance. As the path becomes more defined, the open grass gives way to a village setting where traditional wooden farmhouses and a dense canopy of red maple trees frame the route. The scene then shifts past a collapsed building with exposed beams and scattered debris before ascending an elevated path that reveals a vast valley and a prominent wooden watchtower. Finally, the camera moves toward a fortified stone gate where thick smoke rises from burning debris, with the distant mountain now positioned to the left.
